[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1110111 6
1 1010110 4
2 1011011 5
3 1010000 2
4 1111101 6
5 1011000 3
6 0000000 a
7 0100111 4

70 07 1011011 5 match 2
